LanguageData.VQE_ARCGenerators_Abhorrent.description:
ARCs are dangerous abominations, symbols of humanity’s reckless reliance on technology. Their existence brings unease, and their use risks inviting catastrophe.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effects:</color>
 - Tantrum mental breaks will target the ARC if it is reachable.
LanguageData.VQE_ARCGenerators_Abhorrent.label: abhorrent
LanguageData.VQE_ARCGenerators_Exalted.description: ARCs are humanity's greatest achievement, a symbol of progress and survival. To damage or neglect an ARC is sacrilege, while their presence inspires hope and purpose in all.
LanguageData.VQE_ARCGenerators_Exalted.label: exalted
